'''ây-h-p''' ('''yahapa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:flipflop|flipflop]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-h-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:flipflop|flipflop]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-h-p
|-
! Lemma
| yahapa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yahapithi|yahapithi]] || [[word:yahapiji|yahapiji]] || [[word:yahapishi|yahapishi]] || [[word:yahapi|yahapi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yahaputhuth|yahaputhuth]] || [[word:yahapujuj|yahapujuj]] || [[word:yahapushush|yahapushush]] || [[word:yahap|yahap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yahaputhu|yahaputhu]] || [[word:yahapuju|yahapuju]] || [[word:yahapushu|yahapushu]] || [[word:yahapu|yahapu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yahapufuth|yahapufuth]] || [[word:yahapufuj|yahapufuj]] || [[word:yahapufush|yahapufush]] || [[word:yahapuf|yahapuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yahapethe|yahapethe]] || [[word:yahapeje|yahapeje]] || [[word:yahapeshe|yahapeshe]] || [[word:yahape|yahape]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yahapothoth|yahapothoth]] || [[word:yahapojoj|yahapojoj]] || [[word:yahaposhosh|yahaposhosh]] || [[word:yahap|yahap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yahapotho|yahapotho]] || [[word:yahapojo|yahapojo]] || [[word:yahaposho|yahaposho]] || [[word:yahapo|yahapo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yahapofoth|yahapofoth]] || [[word:yahapofoj|yahapofoj]] || [[word:yahapofosh|yahapofosh]] || [[word:yahapof|yahapof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yahapĂŠthĂŠ|yahapĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:yahapĂŠjĂŠ|yahapĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:yahapĂŠshĂŠ|yahapĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:yahapĂŠ|yahapĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yahapathath|yahapathath]] || [[word:yahapajaj|yahapajaj]] || [[word:yahapashash|yahapashash]] || [[word:yahap|yahap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yahapatha|yahapatha]] || [[word:yahapaja|yahapaja]] || [[word:yahapasha|yahapasha]] || [[word:yahapa|yahapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yahapafath|yahapafath]] || [[word:yahapafaj|yahapafaj]] || [[word:yahapafash|yahapafash]] || [[word:yahapaf|yahapaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:yahapasha|yahapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goyahapasha|goyahapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiyahapasha|gokiyahapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:yahapnĂŒsha|yahapnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goyahapnknĂŒsha|goyahapnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiyahapnĂŒsha|gokiyahapnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yahapshĂ«sha|yahapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyahapnkshĂ«sha|goyahapnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyahapshĂ«sha|gokiyahapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yahaprosha|yahaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyahapnkrosha|goyahapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyahaprosha|gokiyahaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yahapmusha|yahapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goyahapnkmusha|goyahapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyahapmusha|gokiyahapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:yahapsherasha|yahapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goyahapnksherasha|goyahapnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiyahapsherasha|gokiyahapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:yahapngasha|yahapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goyahapnkngasha|goyahapnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiyahapngasha|gokiyahapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yahapyasha|yahapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goyahapnkyasha|goyahapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiyahapyasha|gokiyahapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:yahapyamasha|yahapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goyahapnkyamasha|goyahapnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiyahapyamasha|gokiyahapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:yahapnĂŒshĂ«sha|yahapnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyahapnknĂŒshĂ«sha|goyahapnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyahapnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokiyahapnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yahapnĂŒrosha|yahapnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyahapnknĂŒrosha|goyahapnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyahapnĂŒrosha|gokiyahapnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yahapnĂŒmusha|yahapnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyahapnknĂŒmusha|goyahapnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyahapnĂŒmusha|gokiyahapnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:yahapshĂ«nĂŒsha|yahapshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyahapnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|goyahapnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyahapshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokiyahapshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yahapshĂ«rosha|yahapshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyahapnkshĂ«rosha|goyahapnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyahapshĂ«rosha|gokiyahapshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yahapshĂ«musha|yahapshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyahapnkshĂ«musha|goyahapnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyahapshĂ«musha|gokiyahapshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:yahapronĂŒsha|yahapronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyahapnkronĂŒsha|goyahapnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyahapronĂŒsha|gokiyahapronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:yahaproshĂ«sha|yahaproshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyahapnkroshĂ«sha|goyahapnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyahaproshĂ«sha|gokiyahaproshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yahapromusha|yahapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyahapnkromusha|goyahapnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyahapromusha|gokiyahapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:yahapmunĂŒsha|yahapmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyahapnkmunĂŒsha|goyahapnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyahapmunĂŒsha|gokiyahapmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:yahapmushĂ«sha|yahapmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyahapnkmushĂ«sha|goyahapnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyahapmushĂ«sha|gokiyahapmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yahapmurosha|yahapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyahapnkmurosha|goyahapnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyahapmurosha|gokiyahapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:yahap|yahap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:yĂŠhĂŠp|yĂŠhĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoyahap|hoyahap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoyĂŠhĂŠp|hoyĂŠhĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyahap|hohoyahap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyĂŠhĂŠp|hohoyĂŠhĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒyahap|nĂŒyahap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒyĂŠhĂŠp|nĂŒyĂŠhĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒyahap|nĂŒnĂŒyahap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒyĂŠhĂŠp|nĂŒnĂŒyĂŠhĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻyahap|nĂŻyahap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻyĂŠhĂŠp|nĂŻyĂŠhĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻyahap|nĂŻnĂŻyahap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻyĂŠhĂŠp|nĂŻnĂŻyĂŠhĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luyahap|luyahap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luyĂŠhĂŠp|luyĂŠhĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyahap|luluyahap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyĂŠhĂŠp|luluyĂŠhĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liyahap|liyahap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liyĂŠhĂŠp|liyĂŠhĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyahap|liliyahap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyĂŠhĂŠp|liliyĂŠhĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koyahap|koyahap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koyĂŠhĂŠp|koyĂŠhĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyahap|kokoyahap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyĂŠhĂŠp|kokoyĂŠhĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keyahap|keyahap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keyĂŠhĂŠp|keyĂŠhĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyahap|kekeyahap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyĂŠhĂŠp|kekeyĂŠhĂŠp]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
